zh.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastre是Adam Banastre和Jane Holland的兒子，於1310年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可洛斯頓。他於1328年與Margaraet Hodges在英國英格蘭藍卡爾可洛斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年在英國藍卡爾可洛斯頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastre是Adam Banastre和Jane Holland的儿子，于1310年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾可洛斯頓。他于1328年与Margaraet Hodges在英国英格兰藍卡爾可洛斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年在英国藍卡爾可洛斯頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastre was born in 1310, in Croston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Adam Banastre and Jane Holland. He married Margaraet Hodges in 1328, in Croston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1367, in Croston, Lancashire, England, at the age of 57.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastreは1310年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクロストンでAdam BanastreとJane Hollandの息子として生まれた。1328年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクロストンでMargaraet Hodgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年にイギリスランカシュアイアクロストンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastre(은)는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 Adam Banastre(와)과 Jane Holland의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 Margaraet Hodges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 영국 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Adam de Banastre родился в 1310 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Adam Banastre и Jane Holland. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaraet Hodges в 1328 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1367 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.
